objective: Prepare a Builder self-build pack that creates a unified catalog for accepted external agents and registers remediation_intake_operator_agent_v1 as the first entry.
scope: create agent_catalog/AGENT_CATALOG.json only at Builder runtime
copy validate_agent_catalog_v1.ps1 into validators only at Builder runtime
validate the catalog against the existing accepted remediation intake operator agent package and GitHub Actions workflow
write AGENT_CATALOG_V1 proof and report only after validation evidence
complete PHASE69 task and capability only after catalog validation evidence
validation: PowerShell parser check passes for PHASE69 APPLY.ps1
PowerShell parser check passes for PHASE69 validator payload
agent_catalog/proof/report/root-validator runtime outputs are not precommitted
generated_agents/remediation_intake_operator_agent_v1 files are not changed during preparation
forbidden_scope: do not create a second agent
do not change generated_agents/remediation_intake_operator_agent_v1 files during preparation
do not modify old proof/report files
do not commit or push during preparation
do not run PHASE69 runtime during preparation
